title.en: Bridge Management: EVB, PCR, and the TSN Managed Objects
title.zh: 网桥管理：EVB、PCR 与 TSN 受管对象

blocks.en: This is the last of four lessons on Clause 12 (Bridge management). It walks the final seven subclauses, which give a management system the 'knobs and dials' for the most advanced bridge features: data-center virtualization and the Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) toolkit. A managed object is simply a named, readable/writable variable that a management station can poke at to configure or monitor a bridge — think of each table row as a settings panel for one feature instance.
blocks.zh: 这是 Clause 12（网桥管理）四节课中的最后一节。它走完最后七个子条款，这些条款为最先进的网桥功能提供了“旋钮与仪表”：数据中心虚拟化，以及时间敏感网络（TSN, Time-Sensitive Networking）工具集。受管对象（managed object）就是一个有名字、可读可写的变量，管理站可以通过它来配置或监控网桥——可以把每一行表项想象成某个功能实例的设置面板。

blocks.en: First, the virtualization corner. 12.26 covers Edge Virtual Bridging (EVB) management — EVB lets a bridge cooperate with a virtualized server so that virtual machines look like real network endpoints. The EVB system base table (12.26.1) holds system-wide identifiers and defaults (e.g. whether the system is an EVB Bridge 'sysB' or an EVB station 'sysS', plus LLDP and timer defaults). Around it sit the SBP table entry (12.26.2) for each Station-facing Bridge Port, the VSI table entry (12.26.3) tracking each active Virtual Station Interface, S-channel configuration (12.26.4) for Uplink Access Ports and their channels, and ER management (12.26.5) for the Edge Relays inside an EVB station.
blocks.zh: 先看虚拟化这一角。12.26 讲边缘虚拟网桥（EVB, Edge Virtual Bridging）管理——EVB 让网桥与虚拟化服务器协作，使虚拟机看起来像真实的网络端点。EVB 系统基础表（12.26.1）保存系统级标识符与默认值（例如系统是 EVB 网桥“sysB”还是 EVB 站“sysS”，以及 LLDP 和定时器默认值）。围绕它的有：面向站的网桥端口对应的 SBP 表项（12.26.2）、跟踪每个活动虚拟站接口的 VSI 表项（12.26.3）、用于上行接入端口及其信道的 S-channel 配置（12.26.4），以及 EVB 站内边缘中继（ER, Edge Relay）的管理（12.26.5）。

blocks.en: A handy pattern: many of these tables are linked. Creating an SBP table entry (12.26.2) or a URP table entry (12.26.5) automatically spawns a matching ECP table entry (12.27) keyed on the same ComponentID and Port Number. Deleting one deletes the other. The standard wires the life-cycles together so management never leaves an orphaned control object.
blocks.zh: 一个实用规律：许多表是联动的。创建一个 SBP 表项（12.26.2）或 URP 表项（12.26.5）会自动生成一个对应的 ECP 表项（12.27），以相同的 ComponentID 与端口号为键。删除其一即删除另一个。标准把它们的生命周期绑在一起，使管理操作永远不会留下孤立的控制对象。

blocks.en: 12.27 covers Edge Control Protocol (ECP) management — ECP is a simple reliable transport used to carry EVB exchanges (such as VSI discovery). Its single read-only ECP table entry (12.27.1) exposes per-port timers and counters (acknowledgement timer, retry limit, transmit/receive frame counts). You don't create ECP rows directly; they appear and vanish with the SBP/URP ports they serve.
blocks.zh: 12.27 讲边缘控制协议（ECP, Edge Control Protocol）管理——ECP 是一种简单可靠的传输协议，用来承载 EVB 交互（如 VSI 发现）。它唯一的只读 ECP 表项（12.27.1）暴露每端口的定时器与计数器（确认定时器、重试上限、发送/接收帧计数）。你不能直接创建 ECP 行；它们随着所服务的 SBP/URP 端口出现和消失。

blocks.en: 12.28 covers Path Control and Reservation (PCR) management. PCR is about engineering explicit, redundant paths in a Shortest Path Bridging network using Maximally Redundant Trees (MRTs) — two trees ('blue' and 'red') that route around any single failure. The PCR ECT Static Entry managed object (12.28.1) is created/read/written/deleted per Base VID and stores the MRT-Blue VID and MRT-Red VID. The PCR Topology ECT Table managed object (12.28.2) is read-only; IS-IS fills it with the MRT bindings discovered across all bridges in the region.
blocks.zh: 12.28 讲路径控制与预留（PCR, Path Control and Reservation）管理。PCR 关注的是在最短路径桥接网络中，用最大冗余树（MRT, Maximally Redundant Trees）来工程化地构建显式、冗余的路径——两棵树（“蓝”与“红”）可绕开任意单点故障。PCR ECT 静态条目受管对象（12.28.1）按每个基础 VID（Base VID）创建/读取/写入/删除，存放 MRT-蓝 VID 与 MRT-红 VID。PCR 拓扑 ECT 表受管对象（12.28.2）是只读的；IS-IS 用区域内所有网桥发现的 MRT 绑定来填充它。

blocks.en: Now the TSN core. 12.29 covers managed objects for scheduled traffic — the time-aware shaper from clause 8.6.8.4. Its Gate Parameter Table (12.29.1) is the schedule itself: a gate control list of open/close operations, a cycle time, and a base time, all expressed against the precise on-the-wire timing point. 12.29.2 (timing points for scheduled traffic) pins down exactly where on the wire those gate events are measured — the boundary between the network media and the PHY — so every bridge in a TSN path agrees on 'when' to the nanosecond.
blocks.zh: 现在进入 TSN 核心。12.29 讲计划流量（scheduled traffic）的受管对象——即来自 8.6.8.4 的时间感知整形器。它的门控参数表（Gate Parameter Table，12.29.1）就是日程本身：一个由开/关操作组成的门控列表（gate control list）、一个周期时间和一个基准时间，全部相对于精确的“线上时间点”表达。12.29.2（计划流量的时间点）精确钉住这些门控事件在线缆上的测量位置——即网络介质与 PHY 的边界——使 TSN 路径上每个网桥都能纳秒级地就“何时”达成一致。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  S[Scheduled traffic 12.29] --> G[Gate Parameter Table]
  P[Frame preemption 12.30] --> F[Preemption Param Table]
  C[Per-stream class+meter 12.31] --> T[8 tables: filter/gate/meter/scheduler]
  R[Stream reservation 12.32] --> CNC[Read by TSN CNC]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  S[计划流量 12.29] --> G[门控参数表]
  P[帧抢占 12.30] --> F[抢占参数表]
  C[逐流分类与计量 12.31] --> T[8 张表: 过滤/门/计量/调度]
  R[流预留 12.32] --> CNC[由 TSN CNC 读取]

blocks.en: 12.30 covers managed objects for frame preemption — letting a high-priority 'express' frame interrupt a long 'preemptable' frame mid-transmission. The Frame Preemption Parameter table (12.30.1) carries: framePreemptionAdminStatus (12.30.1.1, per-priority 'express' vs 'preemptable'), holdAdvance (12.30.1.2, nanoseconds to stop a preemptable frame), releaseAdvance (12.30.1.3, nanoseconds to resume), preemptionActive (12.30.1.4, is it on now?), and holdRequest (12.30.1.5, hold vs release signal to the MAC).
blocks.zh: 12.30 讲帧抢占（frame preemption）的受管对象——允许高优先级的“快速”帧在传输途中打断一个较长的“可抢占”帧。帧抢占参数表（12.30.1）携带：framePreemptionAdminStatus（12.30.1.1，每优先级的“快速”或“可抢占”）、holdAdvance（12.30.1.2，停止可抢占帧所需的纳秒数）、releaseAdvance（12.30.1.3，恢复所需的纳秒数）、preemptionActive（12.30.1.4，当前是否启用）和 holdRequest（12.30.1.5，发给 MAC 的保持或释放信号）。

blocks.en: 12.31 covers managed objects for per-stream classification and metering — the engine behind Per-Stream Filtering and Policing (PSFP) and Asynchronous Traffic Shaping (ATS). It is a family of eight tables: the Stream Parameter Table (12.31.1) caps how many instances exist; the Stream Filter Instance Table (12.31.2) matches a frame to a filter; the Stream Gate Instance Table (12.31.3) gates streams in time and assigns an internal priority value (IPV); the Flow Meter Instance Table (12.31.4) polices rate with CIR/CBS/EIR/EBS; the Scheduler Instance Table (12.31.5), Scheduler Group Instance Table (12.31.6), Scheduler Port Parameter Table (12.31.7), and Scheduler Timing Characteristics Table (12.31.8) carry the ATS scheduler parameters, group membership, per-port counters, and per-port-pair timing bounds.
blocks.zh: 12.31 讲逐流分类与计量（per-stream classification and metering）的受管对象——即逐流过滤与监管（PSFP, Per-Stream Filtering and Policing）和异步流量整形（ATS, Asynchronous Traffic Shaping）背后的引擎。它是一组八张表：流参数表（12.31.1）限定各类实例的数量上限；流过滤实例表（12.31.2）把帧匹配到某个过滤器；流门实例表（12.31.3）在时间上对流进行门控并赋予内部优先级值（IPV, internal priority value）；流量计量实例表（12.31.4）用 CIR/CBS/EIR/EBS 进行速率监管；调度器实例表（12.31.5）、调度器组实例表（12.31.6）、调度器端口参数表（12.31.7）和调度器时序特性表（12.31.8）承载 ATS 调度器参数、组归属、每端口计数器以及每端口对的时序边界。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 400 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="55" width="70" height="40"/><text x="45" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Filter</text><rect x="110" y="55" width="70" height="40"/><text x="145" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Gate</text><rect x="210" y="20" width="70" height="40"/><text x="245" y="44" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Meter</text><rect x="210" y="90" width="70" height="40"/><text x="245" y="114" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Scheduler</text><rect x="310" y="55" width="70" height="40"/><text x="345" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Egress</text><line x1="80" y1="75" x2="110" y2="75"/><line x1="180" y1="75" x2="210" y2="40"/><line x1="180" y1="75" x2="210" y2="110"/><line x1="280" y1="40" x2="310" y2="75"/><line x1="280" y1="110" x2="310" y2="75"/></svg>

caption.en: The 12.31 pipeline: a frame is matched by a Stream Filter (12.31.2), time-gated by a Stream Gate (12.31.3), then policed by a Flow Meter (12.31.4) and/or shaped by an ATS Scheduler (12.31.5–12.31.8) before egress.
caption.zh: 12.31 的流水线：帧先由流过滤器（12.31.2）匹配，再由流门（12.31.3）按时间门控，然后由流量计量器（12.31.4）监管以及/或由 ATS 调度器（12.31.5–12.31.8）整形，最后送出。

blocks.en: 12.32 covers Stream reservation remote management — the managed objects a Centralized Network Configuration (CNC) station reads to plan TSN streams. Bridge Delay (12.32.1) reports the relay's worst-case forwarding delay split into a length-independent part (12.32.1.1) and a per-octet length-dependent part (12.32.1.2). Propagation Delay (12.32.2) gives the cable delay to the neighbor via txPropagationDelay (12.32.2.1). Static Trees (12.32.3) tells the CNC, via staticTreesSupported (12.32.3.1), whether the bridge can pin persistent paths using the TE-MSTID. MRP External Control (12.32.4) lets the CNC proxy the Multiple Registration Protocol: externalControl (12.32.4.1) hands a port over to the CNC, while the indication and request lists (12.32.4.2–12.32.4.8) let it read received registrations and push declarations.
blocks.zh: 12.32 讲流预留远程管理（stream reservation remote management）——即集中式网络配置（CNC, Centralized Network Configuration）站为规划 TSN 流而读取的受管对象。网桥时延（Bridge Delay，12.32.1）报告中继的最坏转发时延，拆分为与长度无关的部分（12.32.1.1）和按字节计的与长度相关的部分（12.32.1.2）。传播时延（Propagation Delay，12.32.2）通过 txPropagationDelay（12.32.2.1）给出到邻居的线缆时延。静态树（Static Trees，12.32.3）通过 staticTreesSupported（12.32.3.1）告诉 CNC 该网桥能否用 TE-MSTID 钉住持久路径。MRP 外部控制（MRP External Control，12.32.4）让 CNC 代理多重注册协议：externalControl（12.32.4.1）把某端口交给 CNC，而指示列表与请求列表（12.32.4.2–12.32.4.8）让它读取收到的注册并推送声明。

summary.en: Full coverage map — every clause number in this lesson
summary.zh: 完整覆盖地图——本课涉及的每个条款号

blocks.en: EVB (12.26): system base table 12.26.1, SBP table 12.26.2, VSI table 12.26.3, S-channel config incl. UAP and S-channel interface entries 12.26.4, ER/URP management 12.26.5. ECP (12.27): ECP table entry 12.27.1. PCR (12.28): PCR ECT Static Entry 12.28.1, PCR Topology ECT Table 12.28.2. Scheduled traffic (12.29): Gate Parameter Table 12.29.1, timing points 12.29.2. Frame preemption (12.30): Frame Preemption Parameter table 12.30.1. Per-stream classification/metering (12.31): Stream Parameter Table 12.31.1, Stream Filter Instance Table 12.31.2, Stream Gate Instance Table 12.31.3, Flow Meter Instance Table 12.31.4, Scheduler Instance Table 12.31.5, Scheduler Group Instance Table 12.31.6, Scheduler Port Parameter Table 12.31.7, Scheduler Timing Characteristics Table 12.31.8. Stream reservation remote management (12.32): Bridge Delay 12.32.1, Propagation Delay 12.32.2, Static Trees 12.32.3, MRP External Control 12.32.4.
blocks.zh: EVB（12.26）：系统基础表 12.26.1、SBP 表 12.26.2、VSI 表 12.26.3、S-channel 配置（含 UAP 与 S-channel 接口表项）12.26.4、ER/URP 管理 12.26.5。ECP（12.27）：ECP 表项 12.27.1。PCR（12.28）：PCR ECT 静态条目 12.28.1、PCR 拓扑 ECT 表 12.28.2。计划流量（12.29）：门控参数表 12.29.1、时间点 12.29.2。帧抢占（12.30）：帧抢占参数表 12.30.1。逐流分类与计量（12.31）：流参数表 12.31.1、流过滤实例表 12.31.2、流门实例表 12.31.3、流量计量实例表 12.31.4、调度器实例表 12.31.5、调度器组实例表 12.31.6、调度器端口参数表 12.31.7、调度器时序特性表 12.31.8。流预留远程管理（12.32）：网桥时延 12.32.1、传播时延 12.32.2、静态树 12.32.3、MRP 外部控制 12.32.4。

cites.note: 12.26 EVB management: system base table, SBP, VSI, S-channel/UAP, ER/URP entries
12.27 ECP management; 12.28 PCR management (ECT Static Entry, Topology ECT Table)
12.29 scheduled traffic (Gate Parameter Table, timing points); 12.30 frame preemption
12.31 per-stream classification and metering: the eight tables
12.32 stream reservation remote management: Bridge/Propagation Delay, Static Trees, MRP External Control
